description_long: This is a sleek, twin-boom airplane with a long, straight wingspan and a slender fuselage. The aircraft features a forward-mounted, enclosed cockpit with a clear canopy, and its twin tail booms extend rearward to support a horizontal stabilizer and two vertical stabilizers, each adorned with red and orange markings. The main fuselage is primarily white with a red accent on the upper section, and the wings are long and narrow, giving the airplane a glider-like appearance. The engine is mounted above the fuselage, just behind the cockpit, and appears to be a single pusher configuration. The landing gear is not visibly extended, suggesting it may be retractable or omitted in this depiction. The overall design is lightweight and aerodynamic, suitable for efficient flight.
description: A slender, twin-boom airplane with a long, straight wingspan, forward cockpit, and a single pusher engine mounted above the fuselage. The tail features two vertical stabilizers with red accents and a connecting horizontal stabilizer.
description_view_0: Top-down oblique view showing the full wingspan, twin tail booms, and red-accented vertical stabilizers.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the twin tail booms, horizontal stabilizer, and the narrow profile of the wings.
description_view_2: Oblique underside view revealing the pusher engine placement and the streamlined fuselage.
description_view_3: Frontal view emphasizing the forward cockpit, long wings, and the twin tail boom structure.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: High-wing, straight configuration with no visible winglets or dihedral/anhedral angles; wings are mounted above the fuselage and extend to twin tail booms.
attribute_engine_type: Single pusher engine mounted above the fuselage behind the cockpit; engine type not visually specified.
attribute_tail_design: H-tail configuration with twin vertical stabilizers connected by a horizontal stabilizer at the rear of the twin booms.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Landing gear not visibly extended; configuration not clearly shown.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed cockpit with a clear canopy, likely single-seat.
